# CarWise

> AI-powered car buying analysis: fair price estimates, 5-year depreciation forecasts, history-report parsing, and risk assessments for smarter used and new vehicle purchases.

CarWise helps car buyers decide whether a vehicle is fairly priced and worth buying. Users enter vehicle details (or a listing URL / VIN) and receive an expert-style report covering fair market value, deal rating, depreciation outlook, total cost of ownership, dealer trust, and a verdict.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point to vehicle analysis.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step walkthrough of the analysis flow.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Premium, and Pro one-time report tiers.
- [Sample Report](/sample-report): Example CarWise vehicle report.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Browse vehicle listings analyzed by CarWise.
- [List a Vehicle](/marketplace/list): Free form to submit a vehicle listing.
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side comparison of multiple vehicles.
- [Analyze](/analyze): Start a new vehicle analysis from scratch.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions about CarWise.
- [Help Center](/help): Tutorials, case studies, and feature guides.
- [Roadmap](/roadmap): Changelog and upcoming features.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the CarWise team.

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
